name: Varonis DatAlert
description: Integrates with Varonis Data Security Platform REST API for DLP alert monitoring, data classification, permissions analysis, and sensitive data discovery via DatAlert and DatAdvantage

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve DatAlert alerts for suspicious data access, permission changes, and policy violations

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by alert severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by alert status (open, under_investigation, closed)

parameters.name: alertType
parameters.description: Filter by alert type (e.g., data_exfiltration, permission_change, abnormal_access)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific DatAlert alert including affected resources and user context

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: Update Alert
actions.description: Update alert status, assign to a user, or add investigation notes

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the alert to update

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status for the alert (open, under_investigation, closed)

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User to assign the alert to

parameters.name: closeReason
parameters.description: Reason for closing the alert

actions.name: Search Sensitive Data
actions.description: Search for classified sensitive data across monitored file servers and cloud stores

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Data classification category (e.g., PII, PHI, PCI, GDPR)

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path to search within

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Permissions
actions.description: Retrieve permissions and access control information for a specific resource path

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File or folder path to check permissions for

parameters.name: includeInherited
parameters.description: Include inherited permissions in the response

actions.name: Get Activity Log
actions.description: Retrieve file system activity events for a specified user or path from the audit trail

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: User identity to filter activity by

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File or folder path to filter activity for

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for activity query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for activity query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity records to return
